ACP_MEDICARE 

LABEL: ADHD and Other Conduct Disorders Indicator – Medicare Only Data 

DESCRIPTION: This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only 
Medicare data, for having attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) or other conduct disorders 
as of the end of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: ACP_MEDICARE 

LONG NAME: ACP_MEDICARE 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CCW
